# About this edition {.unnumbered}

Karl Kautsky, *Das Erfurter Programm in seinem grundsätzlichen Theil
erläutert* (1892) — a complete, unabridged English translation.

The German source text is the Marxists Internet Archive transcription of the
Dietz Verlag (Berlin) 1965 edition. The English translation is new: the
standard 1910 translation by William E. Bohn (*The Class Struggle*) abridged
the text to roughly two-thirds of its length and rendered core theoretical
terminology inconsistently.

A parallel German/English edition of this translation, with an editorial note
on translation principles and methodology, is published as a companion
website.
